steps: The recorded depths are: 3156, 3219, 3282, ___, 3408, 3471. Differences between consecutive known readings: 3219 - 3156 = 63, 3282 - 3219 = 63, 3471 - 3408 = 63. So the submarine dives at a constant rate of 63 metres per minute. Therefore, missing depth = 3282 + 63 = 3345. Check: 3345 + 63 = 3408, which matches the next given reading.
